site.name: QR Photo Gallery
site.og_image_alt: A collage of candid photos captured by guests at a celebration
footer.tagline: The simplest way to collect every guest photo and video in original quality.
cookie.label: Cookie consent
cookie.title: Analytics cookies
cookie.body: We count visits anonymously by default. Accept to also enable session replay and remember your visit across pages, which helps us improve the product.
landing.title: QR Photo Gallery — collect every event photo in original quality
landing.meta_description: One QR code for every guest photo and video. No app, no accounts, no compression. 100 GB of GDPR-compliant EU storage for one year from €19.
landing.hero.subtitle: Guests scan, choose their photos or videos, and upload. You get every original in one beautiful gallery — no app and no guest accounts.
landing.hero.note: One-time payment · available for 1 year · 100 GB included
landing.how.title: From zero to shared gallery in minutes
landing.how.step1.title: Create your gallery
landing.how.step1.text: Give your gallery a name and optional date. That is the whole setup.
landing.how.step2.title: Share one QR code
landing.how.step2.text: Download the ready-to-print poster or put the QR code on your own signs.
landing.how.step3.title: Guests upload
landing.how.step3.text: Photos and videos go straight from their browser into your gallery in original quality.
landing.features.title: Deliberately simple. Seriously capable.
landing.features.f1.title: No app, no account
landing.features.f1.text: Guests scan a QR code and upload straight from the browser. Zero friction, so everyone joins in.
landing.features.f2.title: Photos and videos
landing.features.f2.text: JPG, PNG, HEIC, TIFF, MP4, MOV, WebM and other common camera formats are welcome.
landing.features.f3.title: Original quality stays original
landing.features.f3.text: We keep the file your guest selected. No social-media compression and no downsizing.
landing.features.f4.title: Private EU storage
landing.features.f4.text: 100 GB for each gallery, stored in the EU for one year with GDPR-conscious handling.
landing.faq.title: Questions, answered
landing.faq.q1: Do my guests need to install anything?
landing.faq.a1: No. Scanning the QR code opens a web page where they choose photos or videos and upload them. It works on any modern phone with a camera and browser.
landing.faq.q2: Which file types can guests upload?
landing.faq.a2: Almost anything a phone or camera normally creates, including JPG, PNG, HEIC, GIF, TIFF, MP4, MOV, WebM, AVI and 3GP. A single file can be up to 2 GB.
landing.faq.a3: Only people with the gallery link or QR code can open it. The Commercial plan also lets you turn guest downloads off and collect uploader names.
landing.faq.a4: Every gallery remains available for one year from creation. Download the originals at any time during that period.
landing.final.title: Ready when you are
landing.final.subtitle: Create the QR gallery your guests will actually use.
landing.final.note: One payment. No subscription. 14-day money-back guarantee.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.meta_description: Simple one-time pricing for a 100 GB QR photo and video gallery. €19 personal or €29 commercial. No subscription.
pricing.hero_subtitle: The same simple gallery at both tiers — choose the license that fits how you use it.
pricing.feature_guest_zip: Download every original in one ZIP
pricing.faq.a1: No. It is a one-time payment with no automatic renewal and no recurring charges.
pricing.faq.q2: What is the difference between Personal and Commercial?
pricing.faq.a2: Both include the full gallery, 100 GB, original-quality photos and videos, QR downloads and one year of access. Commercial adds the right to use it for clients, customers, company events and paid work, plus priority support.
pricing.faq.q3: Can I try the gallery before paying?
pricing.faq.a3: Yes. Create the gallery, test its QR code and upload one file before choosing a paid plan.
pricing.faq.a4: Your account is upgraded within seconds. Batch uploads, 100 GB storage and gallery ZIP downloads unlock immediately.
create.title: Create your QR photo gallery
create.meta_description: Name your gallery and get one event QR code in under a minute.
create.hero_title: One gallery. Ready in a minute.
create.hero_subtitle: Add a name and optional date. We create the upload page, shared gallery and single QR code for you.
create.event.date_hint: Used on your printable QR poster. You can leave it empty.
create.actions.note: If you are not signed in, we will ask you to create an account so the gallery stays safely connected to you.
edit.title: Edit your gallery
edit.heading: Edit your gallery
events.title: My galleries
events.heading: My galleries
overview.title: Gallery dashboard
overview.meta_description: Manage your gallery, QR code, uploads and download settings.
overview.upgrade.title: Unlock 100 GB and unlimited uploads
overview.upgrade.subtitle: Your free preview accepts one file. Pay once to unlock batch uploads, 100 GB and a full year of access.
overview.language.title: Gallery language
overview.language.explain: The language guests see after scanning the QR code, including on your printable poster.
overview.language.label: Language
overview.settings.title: Guest settings
overview.settings.commercial_only: Collect uploader names and control guest downloads with the Commercial plan.
overview.settings.disable_guest_download: Guests can browse the gallery but not download it as a ZIP.
overview.settings.collect_guest_name_hin: Adds a required name field to the upload form so you can see who took each photo.
overview.danger.title: Delete gallery
overview.danger.explain: Permanently removes this gallery and every original file in it.
overview.danger.confirm: Delete this gallery and every file? This cannot be undone.
upload.title: Add photos and videos
upload.meta_description: Upload original photos and videos to this shared gallery.
upload.error.no_file: Choose at least one photo or video first.
upload.error.bad_format: One of these files is not a supported photo or video format.
upload.error.too_large: One of these files is too large — the limit is 2 GB per file.

login.meta_description: Log in to manage your galleries.
login.heading: Welcome back
login.error.google_unavailable: Google sign-in isn't available right now — use email and password instead.
login.error.google_failed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
login.error.google_unverified: Your Google account's email address is not verified.
login.notice.reset_sent: If that address has an account, a reset email is on its way.

register.meta_description: Create a free account to save your gallery.
register.heading: Create your free account
register.error.email_taken: That email is already registered — try logging in.
register.error.short_password: Please choose a password with at least 8 characters.
register.error.invalid_email: That email address doesn't look right.
forgot_password.title: Reset your password
forgot_password.heading: Reset your password
forgot_password.help: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot_password.notice.sent: If that address has an account, a reset email is on its way.
payment_success.title: Payment received
payment_success.active.heading: You're all set!
payment_success.active.subtitle: Your upgrade is active — all features are unlocked.
payment_success.pending.heading: Payment received
payment_success.pending.subtitle: We're activating your upgrade.
payment_success.pending.body_auth: This usually takes a few seconds. Refresh this page or head to your galleries.
payment_success.pending.body_anon: Log in with the account you purchased with to see your upgraded plan.
payment_success.generic.heading: Thank you!

overview.share.text: Put this code on tables, screens, signs or invitations. Guests need only their phone camera.

landing.trust.label: Gallery limits and storage
pricing.eyebrow: Two licenses. The same complete gallery.
pricing.feature_one_qr: One QR code and printable poster
pricing.included.title: The gallery is the product.
pricing.included.text: Both paid offers include the full upload and gallery experience, original files, the QR PNG and printable poster. Commercial changes the usage license and adds client-facing controls — it does not hide the basics behind another tier.
create.promise.one_text: Name the gallery — that is the whole setup.
create.promise.two_text: Download it or use the printable poster.
create.promise.three_text: Every upload appears in one gallery.
